scenarios.title: VIEWS action show mode navigates to a named view

turns.name: user-opens-wallet
turns.responseText: I've opened your wallet view. It looks like there are no payment sources connected yet, so no transactions or recurring charges are showing.

result.text:
Spent $0.00 in the last 30 days across 0 transactions.
No recurring charges detected yet. Import transactions to start tracking.
No payment sources connected. Add one (CSV import) to see your spending.

raw.text:
Spent $0.00 in the last 30 days across 0 transactions.
No recurring charges detected yet. Import transactions to start tracking.
No payment sources connected. Add one (CSV import) to see your spending.
